api.api_key_hint: Profile Settings → API Keys. Create a key with the User permission; it is shown only once.

invite_requirements.note: Gamer can send invites when invite tokens are available; Gaming God can send unlimited invites.

perks.label: Default starting class

requirements.note: Achievement points do not stack across tiers. Automatic promotion is disabled while warned; demotion can still occur.

perks.label: Send invites when invite tokens are available
Download all torrents from a torrent group
Create requests and collections
Access Top 10, peer lists, Gamer forums, and Mass Torrent Downloader
Create forum polls and forum games

requirements.note: Achievement points do not stack across tiers. Automatic promotion is disabled while warned; demotion can still occur.

perks.label: One invite at promotion, up to a maximum of two
Edit unchecked groups and their torrents
Add external links and view Top 10 torrents by tag
Trade items with Pro Gamer+ users
Access Pro Gamer and Invites forums; Invites forum requires one month account age
Immune from inactivity pruning

requirements.note: Achievement points do not stack across tiers. Automatic promotion is disabled while warned; demotion can still occur.

perks.label: Two invites at promotion, up to a maximum of two
Edit descriptions for any group, torrent, or collection
Add internal links and delete tags
View anonymized download and snatch lists
Edit custom title with BBCode and double-post in forums
Immune from Hit 'n' Runs

requirements.note: Achievement points do not stack across tiers. Automatic promotion is disabled while warned; demotion can still occur.

perks.label: Two invites monthly, up to a maximum of two
Search with more than 5,000 results
Access Legendary Gamer forum, full site log, statistics, and BBCode sandbox
Access Legendary Gamer Invites forum after 90 days

requirements.note: Achievement points do not stack across tiers. Automatic promotion is disabled while warned; demotion can still occur.

perks.label: Two invites monthly, up to a maximum of four
Delete and recover collections
Send re-seed requests regardless of timing
Add torrent recommendations
Access special forums and item statistics

requirements.note: Achievement points do not stack across tiers. Automatic promotion is disabled while warned; demotion can still occur.

perks.label: Send unlimited invites
Access Torrent Bump tool
Automatic voice in the GazelleGames IRC channel

requirements.description: Special users; similar to Elite Gamer with additional privileges.

perks.label: Access special forums
Add torrent recommendations

requirements.description: Member of the dedicated internal upload team.
Hand-picked members who played an integral role in GazelleGames' development.
Developer whose live changes require senior approval.
Experienced moderator who also assists with account management.
Staff responsible for major site areas and junior teams.
Senior site developer who reviews junior developers' work.
Staff overseeing the site, accounts, donations, and staff team.
Staff responsible for site operations, development, infrastructure, finances, and legal matters.
